title: Eravern's more animal products
description: this mods adds meat foods to mobs like camels, wolves, horses and many more.
body:
This mods implements more loot to mobs which do not have any or not have enough.

the current content of the mod is:

- Raw equine meat = is dropped by horses, donkeys and mules, can be cooked into cooked equine meat.

- Cooked equine meat = is obtained by cooking raw equine meat.

- Raw carnivore meat = is dropped by pandas, polar bears, cats, wolves and foxes, can be cooked into cooked carnivore meat.

- Cooked carnivore meat = is obtained by cooking raw carnivore meat

- Axolotl tail = is dropped by axolotls, can be cooked into cooked axolotl tail.

- Cooked axolotl tail = is obtained by cooking axolotl tail.

- Bat wing = is dropped by bats, can be cooked into cooked bat wing.

- cooked bat wing = is obtained by cooking bat wing.

- Frog leg = is dropped by frogs, can be cooked into cooked frog leg.

- cooked frog leg = is obtained by cooking frog leg.

- Squid tentacle = is dropped by squids and glow squids, can be cooked into cooked squid tentacle.

- cooked squid tentacle = is obtained by cooking squid tentacle.

- Parrot = is dropped by parrots, can be cooked into cooked parrot.

- Cooked parrot = is obtained by cooking parrot.

- Cold strider meat = is dropped by striders, can be cooked into hot strider meat.

- Hot strider meat = is obtained by cooking cold strider meat.

- Raw turtle meat = is dropped by turtles, can be cooked into cooked turtle meat.

- Cooked turtle meat = is obtained by cooking raw turtle meat.

- Bee = is dropped by bees, can be cooked into cooked bee.

- cooked bee = is obtained by cooking bee wing.

- Raw ancient meat = is dropped by sniffers, can be cooked into cooked sniffer meat.

- Cooked ancient meat = is obtained by cooking raw sniffer meat.

- Raw camel meat = is dropped by llamas, trader llamas and camels, can be cooked into cooked camel meat.

- Cooked camel meat = is obtained by cooking raw camel meat.

- Raw armadillo meat = is dropped by armadillos, can be cooked into cooked armadillo meat.

- Cooked armadillo meat = is obtained by cooking raw armadillo meat.


Curseforge version at : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eraverns-more-animal-products
